hero.lead: Rent a delivery-built e-bike for city work — 30-day, 6 or 12-month plans with service, lock, charger and extra-battery options included. Pay daily, billed monthly.

marquee.digitalContract: Digital contract — sign on your phone

popularModels.heading: The bikes couriers reach for first.

pricing.heading: Pay daily. Billed monthly.
pricing.lead: One simple model across every bike: the daily rate × 30 days. Commit to a longer term, pay less per day.

fleet.heading: Six bikes. One simple plan.
fleet.lead: From the heavy-duty Engine Pro to lightweight folding commuters — every model rents on the same 30-day, 6 or 12-month terms.

howItWorks.heading: From signup to delivery in three steps.

01.title: Choose your model and plan
01.copy: Pick the bike that fits your shifts and a 30-day, 6 or 12-month plan. The longer the term, the lower the daily price.

02.title: Sign online & pay deposit
02.copy: Complete identity check, sign the digital contract and pay the refundable deposit — all from your phone.

03.title: Pick up and start delivering
03.copy: Collect at a city pickup point or request local delivery, then start your first shift the same week.

cities.heading: Live in three cities.
cities.lead: Real-time availability across our launch markets. Reserve in seconds, pick up the same week.

service.heading: Your bike is your income tool. We keep it moving.
service.copy: Brake adjustments, punctures and general maintenance are part of every plan. If a bike needs longer repair we replace it where stock allows — your shifts keep running. Damage and theft follow a clear process you sign for up front.

delivery.q: Can I use the bike for delivery work?
delivery.a: Yes. The rentaro fleet is built for city delivery shifts and suits couriers on any major platform. We are an independent rental service and are not officially affiliated with any delivery platform.

minPeriod.q: What is the minimum rental period?
minPeriod.a: 30 days. After your first month you can extend month-to-month or switch to a longer plan with a lower daily rate.

pricing.a: Pricing is per 30-day period. The 30-day plan is €5.90/day, the 6-month plan €4.90/day, and the 12-month plan €3.90/day. The same plan pricing applies across every model.

maintenance.a: Yes. Brake adjustments, puncture handling and general service are included in every plan. If a bike needs longer repair we replace it where stock allows, so your shifts keep running.

extraBattery.q: Can I rent an extra battery?
extraBattery.a: Yes. An extra battery is available as an add-on for long delivery days. The Engine Pro 2.0 carries an 832 Wh pack and the Air One Pro supports a dual-battery mode for extra range on demanding days.

deposit.a: A refundable security deposit equal to your plan's 30-day price (€177 on the 30-day plan, €147 on 6 months, €117 on 12 months) is taken at pickup. It is returned at the end of your rental minus any damage beyond fair wear.

pickup.q: Where can I pick up the bike?
pickup.a: We operate in Tallinn and Riga today, with Helsinki coming soon. Collect at a city pickup point or request local delivery in your area.

contract.q: Do I sign a contract online?
contract.a: Yes — the full rental agreement is digital and signed on your phone before pickup. No paperwork at the depot.

finalCta.heading: Ready for your next shift?
finalCta.lead: Choose your rentaro e-bike, pick a plan and start riding — service support included from day one.

tallinn.headline: Monthly e-bike rental in Tallinn.
tallinn.intro: Tallinn is where rentaro started, and it's still where most of our fleet lives. If you deliver for Bolt or Wolt around Kesklinn, weave through Telliskivi and Kalamaja, climb up into Põhja-Tallinn or run the long blocks out to Lasnamäe, you already know the city rewards a fast, dependable bike. We rent delivery-built e-bikes by the month — lock, charger and service support included — so you can pick one up this week and start earning without sinking a thousand euros into a bike of your own.
whyHere: Kesklinn lunch and dinner rushes pay best when you can cut between drops — an e-bike turns short, dense routes into back-to-back orders.
Telliskivi, Kalamaja and Põhja-Tallinn mix cobbles, tram tracks and quiet side streets; our bikes are picked to stay sure-footed on all of it.
Long runs out to Lasnamäe, Mustamäe and Kristiine stop being a problem when the motor does the climbing and an extra battery covers the distance.
Estonian winters are real — dark, wet and icy. Winter tyres and service support keep you on the road through the months that pay the most.
Same-week pickup in the centre means a newly-arrived courier can land in Tallinn and be delivering within days, not weeks.
One monthly price covers the bike, maintenance and a replacement when something breaks — far less risk than buying a used bike off the classifieds.
tallinn.pickupNote: Collect your bike at our Telliskivi or Kesklinn pickup point — both a short ride from the busiest delivery zones — or ask about local handover. We walk you through the bike, the lock, charging and winter setup before your first shift, so nothing slows down day one.

rentVsBuy.heading: Why couriers here rent instead of buying.
rentVsBuy.lead: A lot of Tallinn couriers are new in town or riding for a season. Tying up cash in a used bike — and owning every repair — rarely makes sense when your bike is the thing that earns.

points.title: No big outlay to start
points.copy: A delivery-capable e-bike costs well over a thousand euros to buy, plus a lock, charger and winter tyres. Renting is €177 for your first 30 days and you're on the road — cash stays in your pocket for rent and deposits.

points.title: Repairs aren't your problem
points.copy: Brakes, punctures and worn parts are part of the plan. A used bike off the classifieds becomes your workshop bill the moment something fails mid-shift — ours doesn't.

points.title: No resale headache when you leave
points.copy: Plenty of couriers ride Tallinn for a season. When you're done you hand the bike back — no listing it, no haggling, no selling at a loss in a soft second-hand market.

points.title: Breakdowns don't cost you a shift
points.copy: If a bike needs a longer repair we swap it where stock allows, so a mechanical fault doesn't wipe out a day's orders. Owning one bike means owning its downtime too.

winter.heading: The cold months are when it pays to be ready.
winter.lead: Tallinn winters are dark, wet and icy, and demand often climbs right when conditions get worst. The riders who keep earning are the ones whose bikes are set up for it.

points.title: Winter tyres on request
points.copy: Grippier winter tyres are available as an add-on for slush, black ice and the long Estonian off-season — far steadier than summer rubber on a December morning.

points.title: Battery care for the cold
points.copy: Cold weather is hard on every e-bike battery. We show you how to store and charge it warm, and an extra battery keeps a long, cold shift from ending early.

points.title: Service support through the season
points.copy: Salt, grit and freeze-thaw wear bikes out faster. Maintenance is included year-round, so winter doesn't quietly turn into a string of repair bills.

pickup.heading: From reserved to riding in a few days.

steps.title: Reserve online
steps.copy: Pick your model and plan and send the request. No payment up front — we confirm a bike is ready for you in Tallinn and send your digital contract to sign on your phone.

steps.title: Collect in Telliskivi or Kesklinn
steps.copy: Come to our central pickup point — minutes from the busiest delivery zones — or ask about local handover. We set up the bike, lock and charger with you.

steps.title: Start your first shift
steps.copy: Leave kitted out for the city: charged, locked and winter-ready if you need it. Most couriers are taking their first Bolt or Wolt orders the same week.

items.q: Can I use the bike for Bolt or Wolt in Tallinn?
items.a: Yes — the fleet is built for city delivery shifts and suits couriers on any major platform in Tallinn. We're an independent rental service and aren't officially affiliated with Bolt, Wolt or any delivery platform.

items.q: Where do I pick the bike up?
items.a: From our Telliskivi or Kesklinn pickup point, both a short ride from the busiest delivery areas, or ask about local handover. We hand the bike over in person and set it up with you.

items.q: Is it ready for Tallinn winters?
items.a: Yes. Winter tyres are available as an add-on and maintenance is included year-round. We'll also show you how to look after the battery in the cold so your range holds up.

items.q: I just moved to Tallinn — can I start quickly?
items.a: That's exactly who monthly rental suits. Reserve online, sign on your phone and collect in the centre — most couriers are delivering within the same week, with no large purchase first.

riga.headline: Monthly e-bike rental in Riga.
riga.intro: Riga couriers cover serious ground — from Centrs and Vecrīga across the river to Āgenskalns and Pārdaugava. A monthly rentaro e-bike keeps that mileage cheap and predictable, with service support and extra-battery options built around long delivery days.
whyHere: Wide boulevards and long cross-river routes — an e-bike turns big distances into easy ones.
One simple monthly price instead of fuel, parking and the cost of an unreliable bike.
Extra batteries available for couriers stitching together full days across the city.
Local service support so small issues get fixed fast and you stay on the road.
riga.pickupNote: Pick up in Centrs or Āgenskalns, or arrange local handover. We set the bike up with you, check the lock and show you how charging works before you ride.

helsinki.headline: Monthly e-bike rental in Helsinki — coming soon.
helsinki.intro: Helsinki is next on the rentaro map. We are lining up a delivery-ready fleet for couriers working Kallio, Punavuori and the wider city — same monthly plans, same service support, same focus on keeping your bike moving. Join the waitlist and we will let you know the moment bikes land.
whyHere: Strong cycling infrastructure makes Helsinki a natural fit for delivery e-bikes.
Year-round riders need bikes ready for cold, wet and dark winter shifts — that is what we build for.
Monthly plans give full-time couriers a predictable cost, with extra-battery options for long days.
Service support is part of the plan from the day we go live.
helsinki.pickupNote: Helsinki pickup points around Kallio and Punavuori are being finalised. Join the waitlist and we will share collection details and a launch date as soon as the fleet is ready.

pricing.heading: One daily rate. Billed every 30 days.
pricing.lead: Every rentaro e-bike rents on the same simple terms — pick a 30-day, 6 or 12-month plan and pay the daily rate × 30. Commit to a longer term and your daily price drops. The minimum rental period is 30 days.

howItWorks.heading: Choose, sign, ride.
howItWorks.lead: Getting on a rentaro e-bike is built to be fast. Pick a model and plan, handle the paperwork digitally from your phone and collect your bike — with service support included from day one so your shifts keep running.

faq.heading: Everything you need to know.
faq.lead: The most common questions about renting a rentaro e-bike for delivery work — plans, deposits, maintenance and pickup. Need something else? Reach out and we will help.

accessories.heading: Gear that earns shifts.
accessories.lead: Add the kit that fits your routine. From extra batteries for long delivery days to bags, holders and weatherproofing — every accessory is built for courier work and can be added to any rentaro plan.

modelsPage.heading: All models.
modelsPage.lead: Every rentaro e-bike rents on the same simple terms — 30-day, 6 or 12-month plans with service support included. Pick the bike that fits your shifts.
modelsPage.planNote: Available on 30-day, 6 or 12-month plans — from €3.90/day on the 12-month plan.

engine-pro.blurb: 750W (1200W peak) rear hub motor, torque sensor and full suspension on 20×4.0 fat tires. Built to carry loads through full delivery days, on any surface.

air-one-pro.blurb: Integrated aluminum cargo rack, dual-battery mode and a 150 kg payload. The pick for heavy multi-order runs.

air-28pro.blurb: 28-inch trekking geometry, automatic Bafang shifting and a 3.5" IPX7 display. Smooth, low-maintenance carbon belt drive for long city kilometres.

air-20pro.blurb: A folding commuter with automatic Bafang shifting, a maintenance-light carbon belt and a 21 kg frame that's easy to carry and store.

air-20s.blurb: The lightest, simplest bike in the fleet: an 18 kg single-speed folder with a quiet carbon belt — easy to handle for shorter city shifts.

air-30pro.blurb: An urban 700C bike with GPS anti-theft, integrated turn signals and Eco / Sport modes — the most road-aware bike in the fleet.

specTable.rangeNote: Range is a manufacturer estimate — real distance varies with load, terrain, weather and rider.

hero.heading: Rent the bike. Skip the price tag.
hero.lead: A monthly e-bike rental is the simplest way onto a quality bike without buying one. You pay a clear daily rate, billed every 30 days, and the bike, service support, lock and charger come together as one package. When your needs change, so does your plan — no resale, no depreciation, no workshop bills.

predictablePrice.title: One predictable price
predictablePrice.copy: Pay a daily rate billed every 30 days. No big upfront purchase, no surprise repair bills — you know exactly what the bike costs each month.

repairsOnUs.title: Repairs are on us
repairsOnUs.copy: Service support is part of every plan. If something needs fixing, we sort it — so a worn brake pad or a flat tyre doesn't become your problem.

commitFlexible.title: Commit as little or as long as you like
commitFlexible.copy: Start on a 30-day plan to test it, then move to a 6 or 12-month plan for a lower daily rate when you're ready. The longer the term, the less you pay per day.

nothingTiedUp.title: Nothing tied up in a bike
nothingTiedUp.copy: Buying an e-bike means hundreds up front, plus batteries, locks and maintenance. Renting keeps your cash free and the bike someone else's responsibility to maintain.

models.heading: Bikes you can rent today.
models.lead: Every bike in the fleet rents on the same monthly terms. Browse the most popular picks below, or see the full range.

cta.heading: Start your monthly plan.
cta.lead: Pick a bike, choose a 30-day, 6 or 12-month plan and reserve in a few steps — no payment now, service support from day one.

meta.title: Monthly e-bike rental — rentaro
meta.description: Rent a delivery-built e-bike by the month instead of buying one. €177 for your first 30 days covers the bike, service support, lock and charger — no €1,000+ up front, cancel after 30 days. Tallinn, Riga and Helsinki.

compare.heading: Keep your cash. Skip the workshop bills.
compare.lead: Buying a delivery-grade e-bike means a big payment up front and every repair on you. Renting by the month turns that into one predictable cost — and someone else owns the maintenance.

rent.title: Renting monthly
items: €177 for your first 30 days — no €1,000+ purchase before you can earn.
Service, lock and charger included in the price.
Repairs handled for you; a replacement bike where stock allows.
Cancel after 30 days, or move to a longer plan for a lower daily rate.
Hand the bike back when you're done — no resale, no depreciation.

buy.title: Buying your own
items: €1,000+ up front, plus a lock, charger and winter tyres on top.
Every puncture, brake and worn part is your bill and your downtime.
A breakdown mid-shift can cost you a full day of orders.
Value drops the day you ride it; you're tied to one bike.
When you stop or move on, you have to sell it yourself.

how.heading: On a bike in three steps.
how.lead: A monthly plan is built to be quick to start and easy to stop. Choose, sign and ride — most of it from your phone.

included.heading: One price. Everything to ride.
included.lead: Your monthly price isn't just the bike. It's the kit and the support that keep you earning, with no surprise extras.

bike.title: A delivery-ready e-bike
bike.copy: A bike picked for city delivery work — strong motor, real payload and built to handle full days on the road.

service.title: Service support
service.copy: Brake adjustments, punctures and general maintenance are part of the plan. Off the road longer? We replace the bike where stock allows.

lockCharger.title: Lock and charger
lockCharger.copy: A proper lock and a charger come with every plan, so you can secure the bike between drops and top it up at home.

swap.title: Flexibility to change
swap.copy: Extend month to month, switch to a longer plan for a lower daily rate, or add an extra battery and gear when your routine changes.

firstPayment.q: How much do I pay to start?
firstPayment.a: Your first 30 days on the flexible plan are €177 (€5.90/day × 30), plus a refundable deposit. No payment is taken when you reserve — you pay only once your rental is approved and you collect the bike.

cancel.q: Can I cancel after a month?
cancel.a: Yes. The minimum is 30 days. After that you can stop and return the bike, continue month to month, or move to a 6 or 12-month plan for a lower daily rate.

deposit.a: Yes — a refundable security deposit equal to your plan's 30-day price (€177 on 30 days, €147 on 6 months, €117 on 12 months), taken at pickup and returned at the end minus any damage beyond fair wear.

extend.q: What if I want to keep the bike longer?
extend.a: Just extend. Stay flexible month to month, or switch to a 6 or 12-month plan and your daily rate drops to €4.90 or €3.90 — the longer the commitment, the less you pay per day.

hero.heading: An e-bike built for the job.
hero.lead: Delivery riding is hard on a bike: long hours, heavy loads and every kind of weather. rentaro rents delivery-built e-bikes by the month, with the motor, payload and service support to match — so you spend your shift earning, not pushing a bike with a flat battery. Pay daily, billed monthly, with repairs handled for you.

builtToCarry.title: Built to carry, not to cruise
builtToCarry.copy: Strong motors, real torque and high payload limits. These bikes are chosen for racks, bags and long days under load — not for a relaxed weekend ride.

downtimeCosts.title: Downtime costs you money
downtimeCosts.copy: Your bike is your income tool, so service support is built into every plan. We keep it moving with fast fixes and extra-battery options for back-to-back shifts.

readyForWeather.title: Ready for any weather
readyForWeather.copy: Hydraulic brakes, durable tyres and frames picked for daily city use — rain, cobbles and winter slush included. The bike turns up ready for the shift.

cityDelivery.title: Suitable for city delivery work
cityDelivery.copy: Whatever app or service you ride for, these bikes are set up for urban delivery: nimble in traffic, comfortable over distance and easy to lock up between drops.

models.heading: The bikes couriers reach for.
models.lead: Power, payload and stamina that hold up to full delivery days. Browse the most popular delivery setups, or see the full fleet.

cta.heading: Gear up for your next shift.
cta.lead: Choose a delivery-ready e-bike and a plan, and reserve in a few steps — service support and extra-battery options included.

meta.title: Delivery e-bike rental — rentaro
meta.description: Delivery-built e-bikes you can rent by the month, with the motor, payload and service support to keep downtime low. Add an extra battery, delivery bag, phone holder and heavy lock — suitable for Bolt and Wolt-style work in Tallinn, Riga and Helsinki.

gear.heading: Kit the bike out for the work.
gear.lead: Delivery is won on the details. Add the accessories that turn a good bike into a proper delivery setup — each one available with your plan.

battery.title: Extra battery
battery.copy: A spare pack for long or back-to-back shifts, so a low battery never ends your day early. Swap in seconds and keep taking orders.

bag.title: Delivery bag
bag.copy: A sturdy, insulated bag sized for food and parcels — keeps orders secure and stable whether you ride for Bolt, Wolt or anyone else.

phone.title: Phone holder
phone.copy: A firm handlebar mount so your map and order screen stay in view and in place over cobbles, kerbs and tram tracks.

lock.title: Heavy-duty lock
lock.copy: A strong lock for the seconds your bike sits unattended at every drop. Park with confidence and get back to earning.

how.heading: From signup to first delivery.
how.lead: Getting on a delivery bike is built to be fast. Choose your model and plan, sign on your phone and pick up — service support included from day one.

uptime.q: What happens if my bike breaks down?
uptime.a: Service support is part of every plan. Brakes, punctures and general maintenance are covered, and if a bike needs a longer repair we replace it where stock allows — your bike is your income tool, so we keep your shifts running.

accessories.q: Can I add a battery and a delivery bag?
accessories.a: Yes. An extra battery, delivery bag, phone holder and heavy-duty lock are all available as add-ons, and you can change them as your routine changes. The Engine Pro 2.0 carries an 832 Wh pack and the Air One Pro supports a dual-battery mode for demanding days.

weather.q: Are the bikes ready for rain and winter?
weather.a: They're built for daily city use — hydraulic brakes, durable tyres and frames picked to handle rain, cobbles and winter slush. Winter tyres are available as an add-on for the coldest months.

platforms.q: Can I use it for Bolt or Wolt?
platforms.a: Yes — the fleet is set up for city delivery work and suits couriers on any major platform. We're an independent rental service and aren't officially affiliated with Bolt, Wolt or any delivery platform.

hero.heading: Made for couriers, not weekend riders.
hero.lead: rentaro exists for one job: keeping delivery couriers earning. You rent a delivery-built e-bike by the month, start quickly, and ride with service support behind you. No big purchase, no resale headache, no day lost to a bike you can’t fix. Choose your model, sign online and start your next shift.

startThisWeek.title: Start delivering this week
startThisWeek.copy: Choose your model online, sign the contract on your phone and pick up the same week. No long wait, no big purchase before your first shift.

incomeTool.title: Your bike is your income tool
incomeTool.copy: If it's off the road, you're not earning. Service support is built into every plan, so small issues get fixed fast and you stay on the road.

priceFitsHours.title: A price that fits your hours
priceFitsHours.copy: Riding part-time? Start on a flexible 30-day plan. Full-time? A 6 or 12-month plan drops your daily rate. You're never locked into more than you need.

staminaLongShifts.title: Stamina for long shifts
staminaLongShifts.copy: Bikes picked for delivery work, with extra-battery options for the days you stitch together back-to-back orders across the city.

howItWorks.heading: Choose. Sign. Ride.
howItWorks.lead: Three steps from picking a bike to your first delivery — most of it from your phone.

models.heading: Bikes that hold up to the work.
models.lead: Hand-picked for delivery shifts. Browse the most popular picks, or see the full fleet.

cta.heading: Ready to start earning?
cta.lead: Choose your rentaro e-bike, pick a plan and reserve in a few steps — service support included from day one.

consent.title: Cookies on rentaro
consent.message: We use essential cookies to run the site and, with your consent, analytics cookies to understand how it's used. You can change your choice anytime.
